title: Cognitive Continuity Program
content: This program studies how memory, identity, and learned behavior can remain stable after severe psychological stress. Research teams compare written records, interviews, and controlled observation sessions.

title: Symbolic Cognition Study
content:
Symbolic Cognition Lab
symbolic_cognition_lab.jpg

The study investigates repeated symbols, ritual patterns, and recognition tasks. Participants are asked to identify familiar forms across different visual environments.

title: Post-Trauma Learning Support
content: Researchers are developing academic support models for students returning after traumatic events. The project focuses on gradual reintegration, memory review, and guided mentorship.

title: Preservation Ethics Review
content: The ethics committee reviews long-term preservation studies and establishes boundaries for consent, documentation, and candidate privacy.

title: Environmental Memory Mapping
content: This project examines how physical spaces influence memory recall. Older campus corridors, classrooms, and archive rooms are used as controlled study environments.
